canonical_definition: An out-of-domain frame identification benchmark annotated with FrameNet 1.5 frames from Yahoo! Answers posts, including unknown and unlinked targets.
papers: FISTAPruner: Layer-wise Post-training Pruning for Large Language Models
Improving Rule-based Reasoning inLLMs using Neurosymbolic Representations

relationships.paper: FISTAPruner: Layer-wise Post-training Pruning for Large Language Models
relationships.evidence: To assess generalization beyond the training distribution, we evaluated the FN 1.7 fine-tuned model (§3.2) on the two established out-of-domain datasets. YAGS (Hartmann et al., 2017) is a benchmark annotated with FN 1.5 frames... (Section 4.2)
